Scans a config *before* it runs — offline, deterministic, evidence-backed — and returns SAFE / REVIEW / BLOCK / UNKNOWN verdicts without executing the server it judges. CLI (`npx calllint scan`), MCP server (`npx calllint-mcp`), SARIF + CI gate. UNKNOWN is never SAFE.
